embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: OpenAI embedding model used for memory items

embedding.dimensions.label: Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions; must match the column in Supabase

supabase.serviceRoleKey.label: Supabase Service Role Key
supabase.serviceRoleKey.help: Backend-only service role key. Never expose to clients.

supabase.userId.label: User ID
supabase.userId.help: Tenant key for memory_items.user_id (single-tenant by default)

autoIndex.label: Auto-Index
autoIndex.help: Automatically index inbound messages into memory

consentDefault.label: Consent Default
consentDefault.help: Default consent flag for auto-indexed items

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject the most relevant memories into prompts

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum content length eligible for auto-indexing
